tool.name: poc_generator
tool.description: Generate Proof of Concept scripts in multiple formats.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate PoC in curl, Python, JavaScript, HTML, Burp, HTTPie formats - Create CSRF PoC pages - Document vulnerability reproduction steps - Share PoC with development teams

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The generation action: - generate: Generate PoC in specified format - generate_all: Generate PoC in all formats

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.). Default: GET

parameter.name: poc_format
parameter.description: Output format: curl, python, javascript, html, burp, httpie. Required for generate.

parameter.name: vulnerability_type
parameter.description: Type of vulnerability (for documentation). Default: generic

returns.description: Generated PoC code in requested format(s)

tool.examples:
# Generate curl PoC
generate https://example.com/api/users curl
# Generate all formats
generate_all https://example.com/api/users POST {"admin": true}
# Generate CSRF PoC
generate https://example.com/transfer POST html csrf
